title: Suki Agent Definition Contract
description: Defines the blueprint for specialized agents in the multi-agent network.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for the agent blueprint (e.g., finance_specialist_v1).

role.description: The professional persona of the agent (e.g., Accountant, Sales Manager).

area.description: The business domain of the agent.

capabilities.description: List of functional capabilities (e.g., invoice_creation, stock_audit).

tools.description: List of allowed framework tools (CommandBus handlers).

prompt_base.description: The core system instruction for this specific agent role.
